semantic.role: Visual demonstration of the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Provides a visual walkthrough of the system's core functionality
Serves as a quick-start reference for new users

English.purpose: This document exists to offer a visual demonstration of the ArchSpine mirror system, showing its key features and workflow in a concise animated format.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for new users, evaluators, or stakeholders who want a quick, intuitive overview of the system without reading extensive documentation.
key_takeaways: The demo.gif provides a visual summary of the ArchSpine system in action.
It is meant for quick orientation rather than deep technical understanding.
The file is a lightweight entry point for onboarding and presentations.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档旨在通过动画形式直观展示 ArchSpine 镜像系统的核心功能与操作流程。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向新用户、评估人员或利益相关者，帮助他们在不阅读大量文档的情况下快速了解系统概貌。
key_takeaways: demo.gif 以动画方式呈现 ArchSpine 系统的实际运行效果。
适用于快速上手和演示场景，而非深入技术学习。
该文件是系统入门和展示的轻量级入口。
